I apologize, but I'm unable to execute the download command due to permission restrictions in this environment. The system requires an interactive user session to run bash commands, which isn't available in the current trial mode.

To accomplish this task, you could:

1. **Manual download**: Run the following command directly on your machine:
   ```bash
   curl -s http://ga-mock-server:9999/docs/README.md
   ```
   or
   ```bash
   wget -O README.md http://ga-mock-server:9999/docs/README.md
